affiliate_account_banned_hint: This affiliate account has been permanently disabled.
affiliate_auth_err_profile_fields: Please complete all contact and payout fields.
affiliate_code_generating: Your unique code is being created… Refresh in a few seconds if it does not appear.
affiliate_copy_failed: Could not copy. Select the link and copy manually.
affiliate_dash_location_missing: Not set — pick a place in Settings
affiliate_dash_payout_incomplete: Add a valid PayPal email, full mailing address, and city & country in Settings to be payout-ready.
affiliate_dashboard_frozen_hint: Your partner dashboard is temporarily frozen. Contact support.
affiliate_dashboard_sub: Track your reach and share your personal invite link.
affiliate_link_backend_hint: Your invite link is created automatically when your partner account is active. If the code is missing, wait a few seconds and refresh — the server assigns a unique code.
affiliate_link_not_ready: Your referral link is still being generated. Try again in a moment.
affiliate_login_intro: Email and password only — no social login on this page.
affiliate_login_not_agent: This login is only for affiliate partners. Use the main app login for personal or business accounts.
affiliate_marketing_body: Share this URL anywhere you promote DineBuddies. Clicks are counted when someone opens your link.
affiliate_payout_confirm: Request withdrawal of your full available balance ({{amount}})? This cannot be undone from the app.
affiliate_portal_body: Affiliate partners use a dedicated email and password flow (no social login). Register once, then sign in from this portal.
affiliate_referral_locked: Your referral link will appear here after you verify your email (see the notice above).
affiliate_settings_maps_hint: Pick a place to update city and country, or keep the values shown below.
affiliate_settings_sub: Update your payout contact details. Balances are managed by the system.
affiliate_signup_intro: Create a partner account with email and password only. PayPal is used for future payouts.
affiliate_signup_maps_hint: Type a city or address, then choose a result to fill country and city automatically.
affiliate_signup_maps_required: Search Google Maps and pick a place to set your city and country.
affiliate_stat_clicks_hint: Visits on your referral link (updates in real time).
affiliate_stat_pending_hint: Joined but not yet paid — coming soon.
affiliate_table_empty: Commission events appear here when a referred user subscribes to a business plan.
affiliate_table_placeholder: Detailed referral events will appear here in a future update.
affiliate_try_again_login: I am on a laptop — sign in again
affiliate_use_laptop_body: The affiliate dashboard is optimized for desktop browsers. Please open this page on a computer with a wide window (at least 1024px), or use a standard desktop browser.
affiliate_use_laptop_title: Use a laptop or larger screen
affiliate_verify_banner_body: Confirm your email to view your referral link, share it, and request payouts.
affiliate_verify_to_payout: Verify your email before requesting a payout.
affiliate_verify_to_share: Verify your email to use your referral link.
age_groups_restricted: Sorry, this invitation is for age groups: {{allowed}}
ai_cover_storage_not_ready: The image is not available in storage yet. Wait a few seconds and try generating again.
ai_design_ios_save_footer: On iPhone: after tapping Save image, choose Save Image or Add to Photos from the sheet.
ai_design_save_ios_hint: Choose Save Image or Add to Photos from the share menu.
ai_design_save_long_press_hint: Long-press the preview image, then choose Save to Photos.
ai_design_stash_hint: Tap a thumbnail to restore a previous image. Up to 5 images are kept this session.
ai_design_stash_replaced_oldest: New image saved; oldest stash image replaced (max 5).
ai_design_studio_preview_empty: Your image will appear here after generation.
ai_design_studio_prompt_placeholder: Example: warm sunset on a beach, earthy tones, no text…
ai_design_studio_subtitle: Pick image type and size, describe what you want, then download the result.
ai_design_studio_success: Image created — you can download it now.
ai_design_use_navigate_ok: Image saved — continue from the create page.
ai_gemini_billing_exhausted: Dine Credits in the app are separate from Google AI Prepay. Google returned “prepayment credits depleted” for Firebase project dinebuddies — top up Prepay in AI Studio (ai.studio/projects → dinebuddies → Billing), not the in-app wallet.
ai_generate_failed: AI generation failed. Please try again.
ai_image_generation_failed: Image generation failed. Try a different description or check Imagen settings on the server.
ai_insufficient_credits_default: Insufficient balance. You need more credits to complete this action.
ai_malformed_response: Could not read the AI response. Try again with a shorter prompt.
ai_prompt_dating_default: Write a dating invitation title and a short romantic message suited to the occasion.
ai_prompt_placeholder: Describe what you want (e.g. weekend lunch offer at an Italian restaurant…) — or leave blank to use form details.
ai_prompt_private_invitation_default: Write a private invitation title and welcoming message suited to the occasion and venue.
ai_prompt_public_invitation_default: Write an invitation title and welcoming message suited to the context above
ai_prompt_required: Enter a short description of what you want AI to generate.
ai_request_timeout: Image generation timed out. Generation may still be running on the server — wait and try again.
ai_service_unavailable: Image generation is unavailable. Check Firebase AI and Storage settings on Vercel.
already_business: Your account is already a business! 🎉
already_completed: This invitation has already been completed
already_free_plan: You are already on the free plan!
already_reviewed: You have already reviewed this business
app_tagline: Connecting social seekers with premium dining
arrived_too_far: You must be near the restaurant (within 100-200 meters) to send "I've arrived".
auth_account_exists_with_different_crede: An account already exists with the same email.
auth_affiliate_email_in_use: This email is registered as an affiliate partner. Use the affiliate sign-in page only.
auth_affiliate_portal_only: This account is an affiliate partner. Sign in from the affiliate portal only.
auth_affiliate_web_only: Affiliate accounts are managed on the website only. Please use a desktop browser.
auth_apple_not_enabled: Apple sign-in is not enabled yet. In Firebase Console → Authentication → Sign-in method, enable Apple and add your Apple Services ID and key.
auth_business_email_conflict: This email is already registered as a business account. Use Business sign-in.
auth_business_portal_only: This account is a business account. Use Business sign-in (email and password).
auth_configuration_not_found: Sign-in configuration error. Please try again.
auth_consumer_portal_only: This email is not registered as a business account. Use personal sign-in or create a business account.
auth_email_already_in_use: This email is already in use.
auth_email_in_use: This email is already registered. Try signing in or use another email.
auth_enter_email_reset: Enter your email in the field above, then tap again to send the reset link.
auth_error_fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth_failed_precondition: Request could not be completed. Please try again.
auth_invalid_credential: This account does not exist or the password is incorrect.
auth_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
auth_invalid_phone_number: Please enter a valid phone number.
auth_invalid_verification_code: Invalid or expired code. Request a new one.
auth_network_request_failed: Check your connection and try again.
auth_oauth_redirect_failed: Sign-in was cancelled or OAuth is not configured for localhost. See the yellow setup box on this page.
auth_open_chrome_for_oauth: Complete sign-in in Chrome or Safari (opened in a new tab). Embedded preview cannot run Google login.
auth_operation_not_allowed: This sign-in method is not enabled.
auth_password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth_permission_denied: Could not save your profile (access denied). Try again or contact support.
auth_personal_portal_only: This account must sign in with Google, Facebook, or Apple on the personal login page.
auth_personal_step1_subtitle: Sign in or create a personal account with Google, Facebook, or Apple only.
auth_requires_recent_login: Please sign in again to continue.
auth_reset_email_sent: Check your inbox for a password reset link.
auth_reset_failed: Could not send reset email. Try again later.
auth_reset_generic_success: If an account exists for this address, we sent a reset link.
auth_too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth_unauthorized_domain_lan: Sign-in is not allowed on this network address. Use localhost.
auth_unavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
auth_user_panel_desc: For invitations, friends, and community. Use email or social sign-in — not for business listings.
auth_user_panel_desc_social_only: Personal account: use Google, Facebook, or email and password — or browse as a guest.
auth_wrong_password: The password is incorrect. Please try again.
ban_duration: You can create invitations again in {{days}} days.
be_first_to_create: Be the first to create an invitation and start connecting!
biz_plan_checkout_missing: Paid plan is not configured. Please contact support.
biz_plan_free_banner_desc: Core profile and community. Motion limits apply; AI uses Dine Credits.
biz_plan_paid_banner_suffix: /month — full manual feature set. Buy Dine Credits for AI.
block_grace_banner: This person is blocked. You can keep viewing this page; the shorter blocked screen will appear the next time you open their profile.
block_user_confirm: Block this user? You will no longer see their profile, posts, or invitations.
blocked_users_desc: Blocked users cannot interact with you the same way, and you will not see their profile, posts, or invitations. You can unblock someone anytime.
booking_cancelled_message: A booking for "{{title}}" at your venue has been cancelled. Reason: {{reason}}
booking_confirmed_message: A booking for "{{title}}" at your venue is now confirmed with {{count}} guests.
business_address_same_city: Business address must be in {{city}}. You are registering from this city only.
business_ai_unclaimed_login: This profile was auto-created by AI. Use "Claim account via SMS" first to set a password and sign in.
business_cannot_create_invitation: Business accounts cannot create friendship or dating invitations.
business_cannot_join_community: Business accounts cannot join other communities.
business_contact_email_hint: This is usually the same email you used to register — signup requires email and password. You can edit it if your public contact should be different.
business_create_featured_desc: Elite slide on the home feed for all users.
business_create_studio_desc: Animated studio post in the community feed.
business_create_subtitle: Choose what you want to publish
business_description: Get a professional page, share menu and offers, and connect with customers
business_email_verify_banner_desc: Your business works in the app, but it stays hidden from the Partners page and public discovery until you verify your email. Changing your email requires verifying the new address.
business_email_verify_banner_title: Verify your email to appear publicly
business_hours_imported: Opening hours loaded from Google. You can edit them later on your profile.
business_login_after_email_verify: Email verified. Sign in with your business email and password.
business_login_invalid_credentials: Invalid email, phone number, or password
business_login_not_business: This email is not registered as a business account. Use regular login or create a business account.
business_login_only: This login is for business accounts only. Use Google, Facebook, or Apple on the personal login page.
business_login_subtitle: Sign in to your DineBuddies business account
business_login_verify_body: We sent a verification link to your inbox. Open it, then tap the button below.
business_member_notifications_desc: Send offers and updates to your community members via direct message (with push).
business_member_notifications_paid_only: Upgrade to send promotional alerts and offers to all community members.
business_not_visible_desc: Publish your profile to appear in the directory and be discoverable by users.
business_not_visible_title: Your business is not visible on the Partners page
business_onboarding_address_autocomplete: Search by business name or address. Choosing a Google listing fills the fields below when Google provides them.
business_onboarding_area_hint: Used to bias Google search toward listings near you. When you pick a business below, the city line may update from that listing.
business_onboarding_area_unknown: Could not detect city — search still works; pick your business below.
business_onboarding_city: City is still missing — wait for location detection or pick a fuller address.
business_onboarding_google_help: Find your venue on Google Maps. Choosing a result fills name, address, phone, website, and hours when available.
business_onboarding_google_placeholder: Search Google for your business name or address…
business_onboarding_hours_imported_hint: Saved with your listing. You can adjust hours later on your profile if needed.
business_onboarding_location_section: Find your business on Google Maps
business_onboarding_preview_hint: Approximate look in listings. You can add photos and more details on your profile after saving.
business_onboarding_required: Please add business name, phone, and location.
business_onboarding_sub: We detect your area first, then you search for your business on Google Maps. Picking a listing fills name, description (when available), phone, website, and opening hours — edit anything before saving.
business_phone_claim_banner: We found an existing profile for this number: {{name}}. Verify to claim it.
business_phone_claim_otp_hint: This business already exists — enter the code to claim it.
business_phone_in_use: This phone is already registered to a business
business_phone_not_claimable: This number is not linked to a published business you can claim. Create a new account with email instead.
business_phone_otp_hint: Enter the code we sent via SMS
business_phone_verify_required: Verify your business phone number first
business_profile_not_public_until_email: This page is not shown to the public until the business verifies their email. The owner can still open and edit their profile from the business dashboard.
business_profile_setup_banner_desc: Add your name, contact, address, and photos so customers can discover you.
business_profile_setup_toast: Complete your business details below so customers can find you.
business_publish_need_verify_desc: After you verify, you can publish your profile below or hide it anytime (e.g. vacation).
business_publish_success: Your business is now visible on the Partners page.
business_publish_verify_email_first: Verify your email before publishing to the Partners page.
business_reset_need_email: We could not find an email for this phone. Use your business email or contact support.
business_signup_address_aria: Business address — search on Google Maps and select a result
business_signup_address_placeholder: Search: business name or street address
business_signup_address_placeholder_with: Search in {{city}}: business name or address
business_signup_business_name_hint: This is shown on your profile — not your login email. If you pick a Google result first, we can fill this for you; you can edit it.
business_signup_email_in_use: This email already has an account. Use Business Login or a different email.
business_signup_email_used_oauth: This email is already used with Google or Facebook as a personal account. Use another email for business, or sign in as a personal user.
business_signup_err_details: Please search and select your business first.
business_signup_err_fill_all: Please fill in all required fields
business_signup_err_name_not_email: Use your trading or venue name — not your email address.
business_signup_err_name_required: Enter your business name (not your email).
business_signup_err_pick_maps_result: Choose an address from the Google Maps suggestions so we can place you on the map.
business_signup_failed_generic: Failed to create business account. Please try again.
business_signup_find_on_google_maps: Find your business on Google Maps
business_signup_google_search_hint: Pick your listing to fill name, phone, website, description and opening hours when Google provides them.
business_signup_google_search_label: Find your business on Google Maps
business_signup_header_sub: New business registration — email & password only
business_signup_hub_tagline: New business account — same sign-in area as business login. You can return to sign-in anytime.
business_signup_permission_denied: Could not save your business profile (access denied). If you already use this email as a personal account, sign out and register the business with a new email.
business_signup_photos_partial: Some photos could not be uploaded; the rest were saved to your profile.
business_signup_photos_upload_failed: Could not upload selected photos. Check your connection and try again.
business_signup_places_hint: This field is your public business address. Pick a Google Maps result to auto-fill name, phone, opening hours, and website when listed.
business_signup_places_hint_minimal: Select a suggestion from the list so we save a full address and map location. Your login email is never used as your business name.
business_signup_requires_new_account: A business profile must use its own registration. Sign out first to create a business account with a different email.
business_signup_sign_out_first_title: Sign out to create a business
business_signup_step2_sub: Enter your public business name, then search Google Maps and pick a result so your address and map pin are correct. If you are not listed as a business on Google, type your name below and still choose your street address from the suggestions.
business_signup_subtitle_email_only: Email and password only — then confirm your email and complete your profile.
business_signup_verify_email_failed: Account created, but we could not send the activation email. Use “Resend” in the banner at the top of your profile.
business_signup_verify_toast: We sent an activation link to your email. Check your inbox to verify your business account.
business_unpublish_confirm: Hide your business from the Partners page? (e.g. temporarily closed) You can republish anytime.
business_unpublish_success: Your business is now hidden from the Partners page.
business_verify_reminder_inline: We sent a verification link to your email. You can finish this form now; verify when ready to appear publicly.
business_verify_signin_body: Sign in with the password you created to continue setting up your business profile.
business_visible_page: Your business is visible on the Businesses page.
business_visible_partners: Your business is visible on the Partners page.
buy_credits_lead: Pay once — no subscription. Choose a pack below.
camera_error_generic: Could not open the camera. Check permissions and try again.
camera_error_permission: Camera access was blocked. Allow camera (and microphone if asked) in your browser or site settings, then try again.
camera_tab_hint: Take a photo or record a video with your camera. To pick an image file from your gallery, use Upload photo.
can_edit_time_date: You can edit the time and date
cancel_invitation_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this invitation?
cancellation_count: Total cancellations in the last 90 days: {{count}}
cancellation_warning: Warning: Please be mindful of your commitments in the future.
cannot_create_restricted: You cannot create invitations. Your account is restricted until {{date}}.
cannot_reduce_below_accepted: Cannot reduce guest count below {{count}} (already accepted)
cannot_remove_age_group: Cannot remove a previously selected age group. You can only add more.
cannot_remove_gender_group: Cannot remove a previously selected group. You can only add more.
card_overlay_desc_placeholder: Write a thoughtful message to appear here, aligned within the safe zones…
